description_long: This is a heavy-duty, double-headed sledgehammer with a robust, cylindrical head featuring spiked ends and intricate geometric detailing. The head is symmetrical, with both striking faces adorned with pointed, gear-like protrusions, suggesting it is designed for maximum impact and possibly for demolition or ceremonial use. The handle is long, straight, and ribbed, providing a secure grip and enhanced control during use. The entire object is a dark metallic color, giving it a formidable and industrial appearance. The craftsmanship appears ornate, with decorative elements on both the head and the handle, indicating it may serve a symbolic or specialized function in addition to practical use. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments.
description: A dark, ornate double-headed sledgehammer with spiked ends and a ribbed, straight handle, crafted entirely from metal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow profile of the hammer head and the full length of the ribbed handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the double-headed, spiked design of the hammer head and the symmetrical, gear-like protrusions.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite narrow profile of the hammer head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the dual spiked heads and the detailed, cylindrical structure.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, ribbed steel handle with a textured grip for enhanced control.
attribute_head_type: Double-headed sledgehammer with cylindrical, spiked striking faces and ornate geometric detailing.
